name: phase1_starter_market_impact_sources
description: Reviewed starter source manifest for the packaged Phase 1 market impact relationship lane, including promoted country relationship slices.
storage_policy: Large raw downloads and normalized bulk outputs belong under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data, not in the package.

sources.source_name: European Union reviewed policy overlay source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed EU overlay stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted EU policy overlay covering European Commission, European Parliament, ESMA, DMA, AI Act, CSRD, EU ETS, MiCA, and CBAM mappings to EU and member-state sectors, representative issuer-exposure paths, and Euro Stoxx/CAC/DAX/FTSE MIB index paths while preserving country-specific exchange, issuer, security, ticker, and sector evidence as authoritative.

sources.source_name: Russia reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted Russia first slice covering MOEX issuer/ticker/security/status bridges, Bank of Russia currency/rates/market-supervision rows, Minfin/Rosstat/MinEnergy/Mintrans policy/statistics rows, sanctions-authority/program rows, and commodity-flow or pipeline paths. Source availability constraints: MOEX ISS/Bank of Russia official pages and issuer disclosures were retained as normalized relationship metadata only; raw source snapshots remain under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data, official-source availability may vary by sanctions/geoblocking/robots constraints, and issuer pages require periodic refresh before promotion. Issuer/security caveats: MOEX listed-security identity remains separate from ADR/GDR instruments and market access status; no direct country-to-commodity, sanctions/program-to-issuer, central-bank-to-ticker, or broad sector-to-ticker fanout is asserted.

sources.source_name: Mexico reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted Mexico first slice covering BMV/BIVA issuer/ticker/security bridges, ADR separation for cross-listed issuers, Banxico/INEGI/SHCP macro rows, CNBV/CNE/CRT/CNA/COFEPRIS/AFAC/SADER/SENASICA/PROFECO regulator sector rows, USMCA trade rows, energy/telecom historical-regulator guardrails, and FIFA World Cup 2026 host-country and sector rows without direct ticker assertions.
